Past Lives (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,950,663Details
International Box Office $31,930,042
Worldwide Box Office $42,880,705
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $51,112
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $420,295
Total $471,407
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Nora and Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora’s family emigrates from South Korea. Two decades later, they are reunited in New York for one fateful week as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life, in this heartrending modern romance.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$232,266 (2.1% of total gross)
Legs:6.59 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:25.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/906 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,971,661

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 2nd, 2023 (Limited) by A24
June 30th, 2023 (Expands Wide) by A24
International Releases: July 27th, 2023 (Limited), released as Minulé životy (Czech Republic)
August 10th, 2023 (Wide), released as Past Lives - In einem anderen Leben (Germany)
August 24th, 2023 (Wide), released as Past Lives (從前的我們) (Hong Kong)
August 31st, 2023 (Limited) (Australia)
August 31st, 2023 (Limited) (New Zealand)
Video Release: August 22nd, 2023 by A24
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2763 (cert #53815), 12/21/2022)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Award nomination: 2024 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Filming location (city or town): New York, NY
Plot point: Friends Reuniting, Immigration
Subgenre: Life Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English, Korean

  • Summary
  • Box Office

Synopsis

Nora and Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora’s family emigrates from South Korea. Two decades later, they are reunited in New York for one fateful week as they confront notions of destiny, love, and the choices that make a life, in this heartrending modern romance.

Theater counts:4 opening theaters/906 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,971,661
